package rulefixtures

import (
	crand "crypto/rand"
	"crypto/rsa"
)

// scenario for rsa_key_size_too_small: `rsa.GenerateKey(rand, bits)` where `bits` is literally `< 2048`
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario730Positive() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(crand.Reader, 1024)
}
